title: Module 1
content:
Introduction: Concept and application of Building Management System
(BMS) and Automation, requirements and design considerations and its
effect on functional efficiency of building automation system, architecture
and components of BMS.

title: Module 2
content:
Building
Automation
Hardware:
controllers,
sensors,
actuators,
communication network.
Application to lighting control: Use of light sensors and occupancy sensors
Building Automation Software, Communication protocols, Building
Management Systems (BMS)

title: Module 3
content:
Human Comfort: Human comfort zones, Effect of Heat, Humidity, Heat
loss.
The use of active technologies for improving the performance of air
conditioning and ventilation systems. Pre-cooling strategies, energy
recovery
wheels,
thermal
storage
systems
and
dehumidification
technologies.
Processes: Heating Process & Applications

title: Module 4
content:
Introduction to Security Systems, Concepts. Concept of automation in
access control system for safety, Physical security system with components,
RFID enabled access control with components
Energy Management: Energy Savings concept & methods, Lighting control,
Building Efficiency improvement, Green Building Concept and Examples.
